channel.title: TGaceAllStories
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from TGaceAllStories, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Micron’s stock climbs on this fresh sign of booming memory prices
item.description: Lenovo said memory prices went up 40% to 50% in the last quarter — and they could double this quarter

item.title: My elderly mother has dementia. My sister sold her house and has hidden the proceeds. What can we do?
item.description: “My sister is planning to move out of state and feels it is her right to control the money.”

item.title: Micron’s stock pops. Here’s what an executive said to calm nervous investors.
item.description: The memory-chip maker’s HBM4 is in high-volume production and has started shipping to customers, CFO Mark Murphy said.

item.title: This stock-market strategy lets you play the energy boom while cutting your risk
item.description: A broad investment strategy encompassing infrastructure across developed markets can offer U.S. investors a way to ride along with economic trends at ...

item.title: Low jobless claims point to further decline in unemployment rate and improved labor market
item.description: Businesses aren’t hiring much, but they’re not resorting to big layoffs, either.

item.title: JPMorgan downgrades Kraft Heinz, says it faces limited near-term upside after breakup pause
item.description: JPMorgan's revised forecast implies a 12% downside for shares of Kraft Heinz.

item.title: Bitcoin's drawdown hit 50%. History shows it may have further to go
item.description: Bitcoin has a history of falling about 75% during each four-year cycle, suggesting the token is on track to fall even further in the near future.

item.title: Mizuho, TD Cowen upgrade Shopify, say AI fears are overdone and LLM strategy builds long-term value
item.description: Mizuho and TD Cowen respectively see Shopify rallying 26% and 34%.

item.title: This oil services stock had a tremendous run. Trading its options may be a wiser move right now
item.description: Although this oil services company has been a strong performer, it hasn't grown anywhere near as quickly as its share price.

item.title: Wall Street sees more upside for McDonald’s after strong earnings beat
item.description: For the most part, Wall Street analysts remained bullish on McDonald's following its fourth-quarter earnings and revenue beat.

item.title: Valaris Stock Soars on $5.8B Transocean Acquisition
item.description: Valaris (VAL) shares close up 34.31% on news of a $5.8 billion all-stock acquisition by Transocean (RIG), creating a major offshore drilling powerhous...

item.title: Silicon Labs Soars on Texas Instruments Buyout Deal
item.description: Listen up, folks! If you’re scanning the markets today, you’ve got to see what’s happening with Silicon Labs (SLAB). As of this writing, shares have e...

item.title: Biotech Stocks Skyrocket on Game-Changing News
item.description: Discover why biotech stocks like CRVS and RAPT are surging today on trial breakthroughs and deals. Learn trading insights and risks in this exciting m...

item.title: SelectQuote Surges 23% on $415M Credit Facility News
item.description: SelectQuote (SLQT) stock jumped 23% on January 12, 2026 after securing a $415M credit facility. Dive into the details, risks, benefits, and how simila...

item.title: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) Soars on Promising Inflammation Drug Data
item.description: Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) stock surges over 42% on positive Phase 1 data for MRT-8102, showing profound reductions in inflammation marker hsCRP. ...
